## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the voice guide (first-person, contractions, no prescriptive "you should" framing)
- [ ] Follows `PATTERN_TEMPLATE.md` structure (for pattern changes)
- [ ] TypeScript tests pass (`npm test` in `src/ts/`)
- [ ] Python tests pass (`pytest` in `src/py/`) — if Python implementation was changed
- [ ] No framework-specific imports added to pattern implementations
- [ ] Mock provider included if new implementation files were added
